• HTML5-based multiplayer mining game with canvas rendering
  • Procedurally generated maps with various ores and resources
  • Real-time multiplayer using MQTT protocol for network communication
  • Mobile-optimized controls with touch support and responsive design
  • Save system with local IndexedDB storage and cloud sync capabilities
  • Upgrade shop system for vehicle enhancements and consumables
  • Admin system for server management and player moderation
    class GameEngine { constructor() { /*... */ } update() { /* game logic */ } draw() { /* rendering */ } }
    class NetworkManager { constructor() { /* MQTT client */ } connect() { /* broker connection */ } }

This is a sophisticated HTML5 mining game featuring real-time multiplayer capabilities, procedural world generation, and a comprehensive upgrade system. The game uses modern web technologies including canvas rendering, MQTT networking, and IndexedDB for persistent storage. It includes both desktop and mobile support with touch controls, admin functionality, and cloud synchronization for saves across devices.
